sections.paragraph:
pl. אֱוִילִים m. (root אָוַל).

(1) a fool, foolish, either as an adj. אִישׁ אֱוִיל Pro 29:9 Hos 9:7, or as is more often the case, as a subst. Job 5:2 Isa 19:11 35:8 Pro 7:22 10:14 11:29 14:3 15:5 opposed to the prudent (עָרוּם), Pro 12:16, and to the wise (חָכָם), Pro 10:14 sometimes-

(2) it includes the notion of impiety, Job 5:3.
